transcript: Wow I am so sorry Yo Here, phone Hey, yeah, it's Vargas calling for Joe. Well, I need Garnett and Newell to come meet me. We caught the wrong guy. she was at the morgue two and a half hours ago so where is she i don't know she's probably still talking to tess okay she was supposed to talk to her down here with you okay we gotta go tess is turning us in what did she talk to you great didn't she knew she's come and see you kind of it's not important right now did you show her the files on me you were right cop angle didn't work but neither did the friendship one there's a shocker i can't believe you let her go because you didn't bother to show up he doesn't know how to make small talk it's not the, it's not the time to point fingers right now, okay? You're the only one they're not looking for. Go get the car and meet us at the northeast entrance. We'll meet you there. We finally convinced them you're dead, and now you two screw it up. You afraid of death? Want me to hold your hand? I'm more afraid how trigger happy you two are listen chandler could be down here looking for this guy so don't just shoot at anything that moves for once try not to be such a damn girl scout guys what did i just say hope the rat doesn't file a complaint yeah what is that oh you see something that you like fargus you ever seen a cattle prop before i'm surprised you brought one down here you told us the guy was dangerous we came prepared yeah we didn't say he was some kind of animal. Come on. What do you guys know? Why don't you just leave this to us, all right? Why? Not if Chandler's down here. Look, there's a little more going on here than you know. What does that mean? Who are you guys? No one. Hang back. I'm not hanging anywhere. You're not following NYPD protocol. What the hell was that? You're the one that shot her shot her yeah after you started messing with her look she's dead so she's not reporting us loa knows we're down here they find her body he'll cover for us What exactly did Tess say? She said she's turning us in what even you yes you're lying fine tess said she'd cover for me if i turned you in which which i am obviously not gonna do so after me not you head back to tess and tell her that you will turn me in. What? No. By that time, I will be long gone. Catherine, she's giving you a choice. Okay, she's willing to protect you still. This way, you will get your friendship and your career back. You are not leaving me. I am the reason why we're in this stupid situation. So am I. If it wasn't for me, you and JT would be in the Yukon territories by now. Vincent, this whole time you've been saying that partners need to be there for each other. You, you are my partner. Come on. I've already lost one today. I will not lose another. Someone's coming. Come on. They're cops Okay, I'm gonna draw them out And you sneak past, okay? Okay There he is, there he is Hey, we need him alive! This is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is, this is how it is This is how it is What can I say? What can I say? Another one, help me! But you cannot escape You cannot escape Another one, help me! You okay? You okay? You? Except for two dead cops. I don't think they're just cops. Okay, we gotta get out of here. Wait, wait, wait. What about Tess? She's the only one who knew we were down here, so she must have told them. Where is she? Just don't worry about her even after she turned us in. Not gonna leave until we find her. Okay. We're gonna have to split up Get my hands down. Hold the grate! Come on! Come on! Come on! Come on!
